UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Feb-02-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Respresented by Gwen Washington. Attorney Bill Ford appearing for the Plaintiff.
Defendant Leola D. Jones is present.
Attorney Samuel L. Pooler representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Marte Bassi, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of FEB-06-2012 is vacated.
